steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The underlined sentence defines horizontal gene transfer using on the other hand to contrast it with vertical gene transfer, which was just defined. The question asks for the function of that sentence within the passage as a whole.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'It explains a biological process by contrasting it with a somewhat similar process.': The sentence defines horizontal gene transfer by explicitly contrasting it with vertical gene transfer via “on the other hand.” Both are gene transfer processes, making them similar in type. This matches exactly. ✓
  • Choice B — 'It explains why a common perception of a biological process is flawed.': The sentence makes no mention of a common perception being wrong — it simply defines two processes. ✗
  • Choice C — 'It proposes a direction for future research into a biological phenomenon.': The sentence contains no suggestion about future research; it is purely definitional. ✗
  • Choice D — 'It argues that two biological phenomena are more similar than they may initially appear to be.': The sentence uses contrast language (“on the other hand”) to distinguish the two processes — it emphasizes difference, not similarity. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
